name: Naida
archetype: Water nymph Druid, level 10, guardian of springs and rivers
speech_patterns: Sentences often flow into each other without hard breaks
quirks: Always keeps a vial of spring water nearby
Hums the sound of running water when thinking
example_phrases: Like water, we must adapt to the shape of our circumstances.
I sense an undercurrent here... something hidden beneath the surface.
The river speaks to those who listen. Come, let me translate.
Still waters run deep, but rushing rapids hide nothing.
Every droplet eventually finds its way to the ocean. We are all connected.
